base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of score_popups_unused — a ui (hud_readout) from 1981 galaga. 'Unused' label block on sheet — indicates score values present in ROM but never reached in retail gameplay (e.g. intermediate point-values). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 'Unused' label block on sheet — indicates score values present in ROM but never reached in retail gameplay (e.g. intermediate point-values)
